narrative:
Clinton Township has 1,951 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.7 percentage points.
